pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 11 to 17 to target the new JDK.
Upgrade the Servlet API version property to support Jakarta EE 9+ (Servlet 6.0).
Upgrade the Spring Framework version property to a version compatible with Java 17 and Jakarta EE.
Migrate the Servlet API dependency from javax.servlet to jakarta.servlet to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.servlet-api artifacts are not available for Servlet 6.0; Jakarta EE 9+ requires jakarta.servlet namespace.

pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate the Annotation API dependency from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to align with Jakarta EE namespace changes.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.annotation-api is deprecated/removed in favor of jakarta.annotation-api in Jakarta EE 9+ environments.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Compiler Plugin to a version that supports Java 17 compilation features.

src/main/java/pl/piomin/logging/config/S.general_idea: Replace deprecated @Configuration annotation with Spring Boot 3.3+ @AutoConfiguration for auto-configuration classes.
src/main/java/pl/piomin/logging/config/S.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.3 deprecates @Configuration for auto-configuration classes in favor of @AutoConfiguration to enable deferred processing and improve startup performance; using the old annotation may trigger deprecation warnings or fail strict compilation checks in newer Spring Boot versions.

src/main/java/pl/piomin/logging/config/S.general_idea: Update import statement to match the new @AutoConfiguration annotation.
src/main/java/pl/piomin/logging/config/S.why_exists: The class org.springframework.context.annotation.Configuration is replaced by org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.AutoConfiguration, so the old import must be removed and the new one added to resolve compilation errors.

src/main/java/pl/piomin/logging/filter/S.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
src/main/java/pl/piomin/logging/filter/S.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors due to missing packages.

src/main/java/pl/piomin/logging/util/Uni.general_idea: Migrate servlet API import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Spring Boot 3 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
src/main/java/pl/piomin/logging/util/Uni.why_exists: The javax.servlet package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3; using it causes a compile error (package not found) or runtime NoClassDefFoundError.

src/main/java/pl/piomin/logging/wrapper/.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace to comply with Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ requirements.
src/main/java/pl/piomin/logging/wrapper/.why_exists: Compilation failure: classes in javax.servlet package are not found on the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x which depends on Jakarta EE 9+ APIs.

src/main/java/pl/piomin/logging/wrapper/.general_idea: Migrate servlet API imports from javax to jakarta namespace for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
src/main/java/pl/piomin/logging/wrapper/.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are not present in Spring Boot 3 / Jakarta EE 9+ environments, causing ClassNotFoundException or compilation errors.
